articles.title: OPENAI DEV DAY RECAP
articles.summary: GPT-4 Turbo at a fraction of the cost with 128k context, custom GPTs, and vision in the API.

articles.title: XAI RELEASES PROMPTIDE
articles.summary: xAI has released PromptIDE, an integrated development environment for prompt engineering and interpretability research.

articles.title: 30T OPEN DATASET RELEASED
articles.summary: Red Pajama v2 has been released. It is 2.5x larger than the dataset used to train GPT-4. There is no code data, but it does have multilingual data from 5 languages and covers an impressive breadth. Importantly, much of the deduplication work and some heuristic filtering has already been done.

articles.title: SHARPER IMAGES WITH GAUSSIAN MIXTURE SOLVERS FOR DIFFUSION MODELS
articles.summary: Gaussian Mixture Solvers enhance diffusion models, resolving the speed-quality trade-off in image synthesis and setting new standards for image detail and clarity.

articles.title: ENHANCING ANOMALY DETECTION WITH DEPTH-AWARE TECH
articles.summary: The DADA system integrates 3D data with RGB images for superior surface anomaly detection, outperforming traditional methods in speed and accuracy without extensive training datasets.

articles.title: A UNIFIED APPROACH FOR LANGUAGE-DRIVEN RECOMMENDER SYSTEMS
articles.summary: CLLM4Rec synergizes large language models with ID-based systems, elevating recommendation precision through advanced pretraining and novel language embeddings.

articles.title: OPENAI RELEASES CONSISTENCY DECODER FOR STABLE DIFFUSION
articles.summary: Consistency decoder for the VAE dramatically improves performance for generated images for latent diffusion models. They released one for Stable Diffusion. Open source!

articles.title: TOPICGPT: DISCOVERING TOPICS IN TEXT
articles.summary: TopicGPT revolutionizes topic modeling with LLMs, producing more relevant, interpretable topics and allowing for user-guided topic refinement.

articles.title: DETECTING DEEP FAKES WITHOUT SEEING ANY
articles.summary: FACTOR applies fact-checking techniques to digital media, offering a novel, effective tool for detecting unprecedented deepfake attacks without prior training.

articles.title: WILL GENERATIVE AI TRANSFORM BUSINESS?
articles.summary: Generative AI's increased sophistication has led to a rise in business applications, with Insider Intelligence predicting that 25% of US internet users will use it monthly by 2023. The technology's capacity to communicate in natural language has increased accessibility, extending its use beyond tech-savvy individuals. Although still in the early stages, businesses like Yext and numerous startups are already leveraging generative AI for various tasks such as marketing content generation, customer service, product design, and data analysis.

articles.title: A MINOR CHATGPT UPDATE IS A WARNING TO FOUNDERS: BIG TECH CAN BLOW UP YOUR STARTUP AT ANY TIME
articles.summary: We’ve already seen it with investors not willing to invest in companies that are just wrapping GPT but now it is even more clear. With the ability to query uploaded PDFs, a whole swath of startups just got wiped off the map.

articles.title: PIXEL PERFECT: HOW AI UNLOCKS CREATIVITY
articles.summary: This post breaks down how AI, creators, and scaled distribution tactics like virality and community-led growth are generating huge momentum across these vectors.

articles.title: CHATGPT CONTINUES TO BE ONE OF THE FASTEST-GROWING SERVICES EVER
articles.summary: Sam Altman announced significant usage milestones for ChatGPT at OpenAI’s developer conference, with the platform reaching 100 million weekly users and engaging over two million developers, including a majority of Fortune 500 companies.

articles.title: XBOX PARTNERS WITH INWORLD AI TO BUILD AI TOOLS FOR GAME DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: Microsoft's Xbox is collaborating with Inworld AI to provide AI-powered tools for game development, focusing on narrative and character creation to facilitate and enrich the game design process.

articles.title: SALESFORGE (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Personalize every single email at any scale and in any language.
